Header file for testing health app includes with fakes, stubs, and helper functions.

# Purpose
This code is a C source file that sets up a testing environment by including various fake and stub modules. It includes headers for fake implementations such as `fake_content_indicator`, `fake_rtc`, and `fake_spi_flash`, which simulate the behavior of real components for testing purposes. The file also includes numerous stub headers like `stubs_activity`, `stubs_analytics`, and `stubs_app_timer`, which provide minimal implementations of functions and interfaces to facilitate isolated testing of specific components. Additionally, it includes helper functions from `fw/graphics/util.h` to support graphical operations during testing. The file is part of a test suite that uses the `clar` testing framework to validate the functionality of an application by simulating various conditions and interactions.
